tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control (prediabetes/early diabetes). All other parameters are within normal limits except for a slightly low total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Renal function and electrolytes are normal. Recommend clinical correlation and monitoring of glycemic control.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Vecchio di Montebelluna
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
